classification_rationale: Repo is a Phase-1 scaffolding-only operations/devops toolkit: local deploy stubs, health-check shell scripts, runbooks, SLO docs, and AgentOps helpers (config hashing, agent versioning, Sentry). It defines no protocol schemas, contracts, lifecycle semantics, or deterministic transforms. package.json:3 description="Operations and deployment toolkit for AFI Protocol"; .afi-codex.json:5 role="operations-toolkit"; README.md:194 "Current Status: Scaffolding Complete"; README.md:206-213 lists "What's NOT Included" (real orchestration, DB probes, monitoring). All TS modules are stubs (ops/config-hash.ts, ops/agent-version.ts, src/agent_eval.ts). It SUPPORTS the reference spine but is neither normative nor a reference implementation of the protocol itself.
primary_purpose: afi-ops is a Phase-1 scaffolding operations/devops toolkit providing local-deploy stubs, read-only health-check scripts, operational runbooks/SLO docs, and AgentOps utilities (config hashing, agent versioning, Sentry hooks) for the AFI Protocol reference stack.
protocol_touchpoints: TSSD/vault (operationally referenced: env TSSD_VAULT_BACKEND, health checks, SLO freshness/replayability)
DAG/pipeline (afi-reactor deploy/health stubs, pipeline config paths)
replay/determinism (SLO 'Codex Replayability' target only; no replay artifacts)

reference_only_assumptions.quote:
# Vault backend: "memory" or "mongodb"
TSSD_VAULT_BACKEND=memory
# MongoDB collection for T.S.S.D. Vault (if backend=mongodb)
TSSD_VAULT_COLLECTION=tssd_signals

# MongoDB connection string
MONGODB_URI=mongodb://localhost:27017/afi
# MongoDB database name
MONGODB_DATABASE=afi

services:
  # MongoDB Database
  mongodb:
    image: mongo:7
    container_name: afi-mongo ... MONGO_INITDB_DATABASE: afi
- afi-core - ElizaOS runtime layer ... afi-reactor - DAG orchestrator ... afi-infra - Infrastructure services

contradictions.title: MongoDB declared REQUIRED external dependency in codex metadata
contradictions.detail: The portable-protocol north star treats the Evidence/vault plane as multi-engine pluggable (Mongo/PostgreSQL/TimescaleDB/InfluxDB per vault.schema.json). afi-ops's machine-readable codex marks mongodb as required:true and the sole external service, and env/docker templates hardcode Mongo as the only DB. No PostgreSQL/TimescaleDB/InfluxDB option is offered anywhere. This is the Mongo-tunnel-vision tension manifested in ops tooling and metadata.

contradictions.title: TSSD Vault backend restricted to memory|mongodb only
contradictions.detail: env.template offers exactly two vault backends (memory, mongodb), implying Mongo is the only persistent store for the TSSD evidence plane. Portable protocol requires the vault be storage-engine agnostic (conform to vault.schema.json regardless of engine). Operationally encoding Mongo-only persistence reinforces a specific stack as mandatory.
contradictions.evidence: configs/env.template:40-44 'TSSD_VAULT_BACKEND=memory ... MongoDB collection for T.S.S.D. Vault (if backend=mongodb) TSSD_VAULT_COLLECTION=tssd_signals'

contradictions.title: afi-reactor presented as THE DAG orchestrator across ops docs
contradictions.detail: Deploy/health stubs, README, runbook and SLO docs treat afi-reactor as the singular 'DAG orchestrator' / 'DAG engine' rather than one reference DAG framework among pluggable options (custom DAG / Mage blocks). Ops tooling reinforces reactor-as-canonical-orchestrator, the known reactor-vs-reference tension.
contradictions.evidence: README.md:41 '- afi-reactor - DAG orchestrator'; scripts/run-local-deploy.sh:126 'Would start afi-reactor (DAG orchestrator)'; docs/SLO_OVERVIEW.md:46 'Services: afi-reactor (DAG engine)'

notable_findings.title: Codex metadata marks MongoDB as the only required external service
notable_findings.recommendation: Reframe as reference-stack default; note vault.schema.json permits PostgreSQL/TimescaleDB/InfluxDB. Make DB engine a pluggable choice, not required:true.

notable_findings.title: TSSD Vault backend env var allows only memory or mongodb
notable_findings.recommendation: Document additional supported backends or note that backend is reference-specific; the protocol requires schema conformance, not Mongo.

notable_findings.title: Deploy/docker/runbook hardcode MongoDB as the local datastore
notable_findings.evidence: scripts/run-local-deploy.sh:105 'Assumes local MongoDB at mongodb://localhost:27017/afi'; configs/docker-compose.local.yml.template:13-14 'mongodb: image: mongo:7'; docs/RUNBOOK_LOCAL_DEV.md:38 'MongoDB: Start a local MongoDB instance'
notable_findings.recommendation: Label as reference-spine convenience; keep DB substitutable per portable-protocol vault rules.

notable_findings.title: SLO 'Codex Replayability' target referenced but no replay artifacts or determinism rules present
notable_findings.evidence: docs/SLO_OVERVIEW.md:140-149 'Codex Replayability ... 100% of signals replayable for 90 days ... reconstruct signal lifecycle from vault data ... periodic replay audits'
notable_findings.recommendation: None; this is an aspirational SLO metric only. Replay-critical artifacts live in afi-infra/tssd, VALIDATOR_REPLAY_SPEC, not here.

notable_findings.title: afi-reactor consistently labeled 'the' DAG orchestrator across ops surface
notable_findings.evidence: README.md:41 'afi-reactor - DAG orchestrator'; .afi-codex.json:76 'description: "DAG orchestrator"'; scripts/health/ops-status.sh:41 'afi-reactor ... DAG orchestrator'
notable_findings.recommendation: Clarify reactor is the reference DAG framework, not the only conformant orchestrator.

notable_findings.title: ElizaOS hardcoded as afi-core runtime in env/templates
notable_findings.evidence: configs/env.template:82-89 'ElizaOS Configuration (afi-core) ... ELIZA_CHARACTER_PATH ... ELIZA_RUNTIME_MODE'; README.md:40 'afi-core - ElizaOS runtime layer'
notable_findings.recommendation: Tag as reference-stack assumption; runtime layer is not protocol-normative.

notable_findings.title: No on-chain / mint / contract / emissions touchpoints
notable_findings.evidence: grep for mintForSignal|coordinateMint|beneficiary|epoch|AFIMintCoordinator|AFISignalReceipt|EmissionsMinted across repo returned zero hits in source/config/docs
notable_findings.recommendation: None. The Commitment plane (afi-token/afi-mint) is out of scope for this ops repo.

notable_findings.title: No USS/CPJ ingest-dialect, schema, BigQuery/Kafka, or Postgres/Timescale references
notable_findings.evidence: grep for usignal|USS|cpj|CPJ and BigQuery|kafka|warehouse and postgresql|timescaledb|influxdb returned zero source hits
notable_findings.recommendation: None. Confirms repo holds no normative ingest/schema/analytics artifacts; purely operational scaffolding.

notable_findings.title: Blofin/exchange and plugin IDs hardcoded in env template
notable_findings.recommendation: None; these are example reference values clearly marked as such.
